customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety. Justin is cooperative and transactional — he wants a number, not a relationship. No skepticism, no scam concern, no competing quotes mentioned. The risk is under-investment in the appointment, not resistance to it.
unresolved_concerns: Justin's stated goal is a 'rough estimate' — he has not been reframed toward a custom design. The closer should open by anchoring to the personalized design process, not a ballpark.
Channel ambiguity: Carter said 'they'll be coming by' which implies in-person. If this is a phone appointment, the closer should confirm the format at the top of the call.
sensitive_topics_raised: Active duty Navy — Justin disclosed branch and tenure (going on 5 years). Carter acknowledged a military discount. The closer should honor this and confirm the discount is applied.
Brand-new home — moved in February. Justin may not have full bill history at this address.
exact_promises_rep_made: Military discount will be applied ('we'll be sure to take advantage of that').
Appointment is one hour so Justin won't feel rushed.
Confirmation text will be sent after the call.
The appointment will deliver the estimate/design Justin asked for.
closer_should_know: Justin expects a 'rough estimate' — that framing was never upgraded. Open by anchoring to the custom design built off his actual Dominion usage, not a generic ballpark, or the appointment will feel like a bait-and-switch relative to what he thinks he signed up for.
